entry.title: Re: How to patch a journal entry adding more lines using...
entry.content:
Hi albertosilva,

Are you allowed to update the same Journal Entry manually using SAP Business One client? I feel that the system will not allow you to update it manually also.

If it is the case, the same cannot be updated via DI or Service Layer also.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: Wrong image in repeated containers (SEVERAL BUG)
entry.content:
Dan. 

Looks like the internal cache considers the last part of a URL (after the last "/") as the filename, and that what is cached. 

The bug solution should be to cache the entire URL as filename.

Thank you for your analysis.

Ramiro

entry.title: Re: SOAP Sender Adapter : WSDL and WSDL without policies
entry.content: Same error did you able to find the solution, It is very strange wsdl is download from S4 Cloud and in CI it gives error.

entry.title: Re: Create Custom Field F4 Help View using CDS for In App Extension
entry.content:
Hi @SamannayaRoy ,

Can you please provide the steps on how get to the first screen shot as mentioned in this blog?

 

Thanks,

Bharath

entry.title: Re: Difference between SAP S/4HANA :Public Vs Private edition : RISE with SAP
entry.content: Very good information.thanks.

entry.title: Re: Unable to create SAP HANA Cloud Instance in BTP Trial account
entry.content: To create and administer SAP HANA Cloud instances using SAP HANA Cloud Central, you must subscribe to the SAP HANA Cloud tools plan((hana-cloud-tools) in your subaccount. This subscription grants you access to the SAP HANA Cloud multi-environment administration tools, which include SAP HANA Cloud Central, SAP HANA cockpit, and SAP HANA database explorer.

entry.title: Re: Delta (derived) Depreciation area in S4 HANA
entry.content:
Hello @dkbabu1976 in ECC only book DA 01 value use to post all ledgers in real time so there was need of Delta DA which records difference between 2 DA & post same at month end. Now in S4 no need of Delta DA as multiple DA can post in real time to separate ledgers.

Do below

DA 01 -  Map to accounting principle US GAAP (To which ledger 0L is mapped)

DA 02 - Map to accounting principle Local GAAP (To which non-leading ledger mapped)

DA 03 - If system allow to remove it you can remove it otherwise leave it as area do not post

Regards,

Sumesh Gupta

entry.title: Re: Create Custom Field F4 Help View using CDS for In App Extension
entry.content: Go to custom fields app in fiori.

entry.title: Re: Customizing Defect Creation in Focused Build
entry.content:
Hello,

Thank you very much for this blog @mustameerahmed_khan .

Is it possible to customize and add SMTM integration with focused build-Test suite? 
(we are using ChaRM and for Testing management is focus build)

entry.title: Re: Unable Transfer Deletion Flag from S4 to GTS
entry.content:
hello 

at my knowledge there is no option to transfer deletion flag from S4 to GTS or delete product master in GTS

entry.title: SAP BW planning : disaggregate copy
entry.content:
Hello,

We are working on SAP BPC Embedded. We have a planning bex and a  requirement where Users need to input a Price at the highest level (Territory), and we need that price to be same to all valid combinations of Customers and products group in that territory.

INPUT :

Territory Price

TER1 100

Expected Result :

Territory Customer ProductGroup Price

TER1 CUST1 PG1 100

TER1 CUST2 PG1 100

TER1 CUST1 PG2 100

 

We can't use the Disaggregate Copy because the Price Key figure has an aggregation type SUM.

I would appreciate your help in finding a solution.

Thanks in advance,

entry.title: Manual Bank statement issue.
entry.content:
Hi Gurus and Experts,

When we try to upload Manual bank statement which is in USD currency.system post balances in AED GL(xxxxxx) Instead of usd GL(xxxxxx). However,it was correctly picking for xxx bank and we are facing this issue for other 2 banks.

Please assist urgently.

Regards,

Aman Jain

FIN General Ledger 

@Niraj1 @sanil181988

entry.title: Re: Business partner types/roles
entry.content:
Hi @jbrotto yes new material types can be created, in material type configuration default/allowed views (sales/purchasing/costing) for materials can also be selected.

Regards,

Sumesh Gupta

entry.title: Customer Billing Milestone LinkedIn with vendor payments or bills
entry.content: Is it feasible to connect customer billing milestones with vendor bills or payments, whereby if a customer milestone invoice remains unraised, vendor payments are automatically halted or vendor bills are prevented from being posted, possibly based on WBS Element number or Network Number?

entry.title: Re: #COE#RFL01-Withholding Tax not Calculated Automatical...
entry.content:
Hello @MounaAndre your observation is correct, withholding tax rate needs to be maintained under calculation.

Regards,

Sumesh Gupta

entry.title: Re: #COE#RFL01-Withholding Tax not Calculated Automatical...
entry.content:
Hello @MounaAndre you observation is correct, withholding tax rate needs to be maintained under calculation.

Regards,

Sumesh Gupta

entry.title: Re: exclude date in workflow for invoice release
entry.content:
Hello ,

 

Please fidn the error message  screenshot .

entry.title: Re: BAPI to update Journal Entry
entry.content:
Hello @sangwan please check below thread. Please remember only limited fields can be updated in accounting document in change mode like header text, Assignment, payment method fields like amount, cost centre, business area etc cannot be changed to ensure data integrity. Hope this helps.

https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-discussions/fm-or-bapi-to-change-accounting-document/td-p/8677915

https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-discussions/bapi-to-update-change-the-accounting-document/m-p/3505745

Regards,

Sumesh Gupta

entry.title: Re: CJ88 cross company code settlement GL configuration i...
entry.content:
Hello Aman, settlement GL (cost element of category 21) is picked from allocation structure assigned to settlement profile used in WBS.

But what do you mean by inter-company settlement it is something WBS belongs to company code A while receiver object belongs to company code B - in this scenario you want to use separate settlement GL ? (other than one mapped in allocation structure) if yes you can give a try to CO substitution OKC9. 

Regards,

Sumesh Gupta

entry.title: Re: How to develop on SAP S/4 HANA
entry.content: Thank you Victor for the excellent insights into S4HANA, BTP and CDS

entry.title: Re: How to remove __Metadata from CPI json payload
entry.content:
Do you really need to use Groovy syntax for that?
An alternative could be the use of a Regular Expression ...

entry.title: Re: what is the time period for archiving the invoices.
entry.content:
Hello @Nand, this depends on company policy & strategy like how much old data needs to be archived. It is not something fixed in SAP.

Archiving is normally taken care by BAIS/ILM consultant in project while taking support from functional consultant to perform necessary testing.

Regards,

Sumesh Gupta

entry.title: First script - Sap scripting extraction - how to put a wait to "extract finished" ?
entry.content:
Hello !

I'm working about making a script. First steps 😅
Idea :

Starting from a variant, do an extract from a time period & export the result on a excel file. Extract is done via SP01.


The actual problem (& why it's separated) :
I have to wait the end of the extraction (with a variable time between 20 & 70 seconds).
When the extract is done (seen on SMX as "finished"), i can launch the second part of the extraction to Excel (with "save=>list=>local file, etc...").

At the moment, i separated the script in 2 files to know when it's done...

Second try, i put the command "wscript.sleep 30000" inside the vbs (but when the extract is longer...it doesn't work...due to the 30 seconds fixed period)


So here's my question...How can i manage sap to continue the script only when the extraction is finished ?
Thanks a lot 🙂

entry.title: Re: Where do you find list of BAPIs and Remote Function M...
entry.content:
Hello @kisar all BAPI available in SAP system can found in T-code BAPI, you can drill down in relevant application area for FI & CO.

Regards,

Sumesh Gupta

will be available after activating the Integration-Suite.

kind Regards
Matthias

entry.title: Re: SAP PPPI Material quantity calculation?
entry.content:
Hello 

Material quantity calculation data is stored in tables KALT and KALC. If you open the BOM and check the components, you can also access the MQC information.

Regards,
Caetano

entry.title: Re: Use of Price Per Unit in Material Master & PO
entry.content:
Hi,

The decimal difference will be significant when the quantity is more - refer the below calculation.

You may create another PO with 2 decimal value (in your example, 111.89 USD) with quantity as 10000 and check the difference in total value compared to the same quantity with price per 10 qty (in your case 1118.91 per 10 qty), so that you can identify the calculation.

Regards,

entry.title: Re: Project System service POs partial closed
entry.content:
Hi,

There are 2 options I could suggest:

1. Create a new SES with empty service lines and flag as delivery complete indicator and save. This will close the PO.

2. Flag the delivery complete indicator manually for the PO - refer the note # 2634029 - How to close a service PO 

Regards,

entry.title: Re: How to convert warning message MM072 into error message
entry.content:
Hi,

Its a hard coded warning message cant be customized in standard. You may check the option to control the usage via material status in OMS4.

Regards,

entry.title: Re: MMPV_DATE_CHECK: Error occurred (Note 1082841).
entry.content:
Hi,

In genral, you may bypass the check for a date by setting below parameter ID in your user profile (SU3).

MMPV_READ_NOTE<current date, ex: 20240311>

I would suggest you to check the note (1082841 - MMPV/Close Periods : Prevent shifting to a future period by mistake  mentioned in your question, which explains the system design in detail.

Regards,

entry.title: Re: How to Remove On-Order stock In MMBE
entry.content:
Hi,

Since its only one PO, I would suggest to cancel the deletion indicator, flag the delivery completed indicator and delete the PO again and check the system behavior.

If the delivery complete indicator is flagged and still you are facing issue, run the report RM06C020 in SE38 for the PO and check.

Regards,

entry.title: Re: purchase responcible
entry.content:
Hi,

The purchase group field is intended for this purpose and you can build authorization roles based on purchase groups.

Refer the help doc: Purchasing Group 

Regards,

entry.title: During VL02N PGI, get error "Change the inspection stock of Material in QM only"
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

As per scenario, "Sample consumption" of 5 qty posted from QM through QA11 (Only stock posting performed). Since Storage location of Inspection lot is integrated with decentralized WH, Outbound delivery is triggered after QA11 sample posting. The Movement type inside this Outbound delivery is 331, but stock type is "Blank".

We did the following and got same error both cases,

  1. Tried to post PGI with stock type blank, we got below error
  2. Updated delivery stock type value "X - Quality" using Inbound IDOC from decentralized WH and tried PGI. Still we get same error.

ERROR - Change the inspection stock of Material in QM only.

Business couldn't do PGI. Is there any alternate way? Kindly help on the above.

Regards,

Jeffrey

entry.title: Re: Error while consuming Rest API 'the startDate should...
entry.content: @amo_ry and how does that compare to when you send via Postman? Something is triggering a bad request on their end, so the key is to discern the difference and then use that information to adjust your approach accordingly.

entry.title: How can I enable sorting for an additionalProperty of a column in SmartTable UI5
entry.content: Even fter defining the "sortProperty": "WorkOrder" in the XML view I am not able to see Column WorkOrder as sort field in the table settings.

entry.title: Re: BAPI to update Journal Entry
entry.content:
Hi Sumesh, 

I wanted to let you know that the BAPIs you mentioned are not meant for updating Journal Entry in FI module. They are to update Document Processing, which is different from Journal Entry (payable to vendor). Do you happen to have any working copy that can update the Journal Entry specifically, and not the Document Processing?

entry.title: Re: Migration effort from PRC 2.0 or 6.0 to S4/HANA
entry.content: hey Harry, thanks for the answer.

entry.title: SAP certification
entry.content:
Hello all consultant, i'm currently a S/4 MM and EWM certified associate. My question is, which certification should i take next that best suit my career or for future demand? 

Appreciate your advice. Thank you

entry.title: Re: How to remove __Metadata from CPI json payload
entry.content: • If it is possible without groovy then no need to implement script.

entry.title: How to configure picking strategy M in storage type record?
entry.content:
Hi, SAP community,

What are the steps involved in configuring picking strategy "M" in storage type records? for small / large quantities.

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Will SAP allow EWA reports for DEV systems in the SAP...
entry.content:
Hi WernerJ,

DEV systems should have been supported. Without the Solution Manager, we still have to two ways to generate the EWA reports for systems. One is processed by SAP as Note 207223, and this method only works for the ABAP systems. The other is through the SAP Focused Run system as Preparing FRUN Applications (sap.com), and this also supports the non-ABAP system, such as JAVA or BOE. Both methods support the DEV system as far as I know. 

Best regards,
Vera Jiang

entry.title: CCLM オブジェクト一覧「Last Used」日付有LISTCUBEに履歴無
entry.content:
FioriのCCLM Object一覧からアドオンプログラムの一覧を出力し

添付のExcelのように最終使用日を確認出来るようにしています。

この情報にSolManのLISTCUBE、infoprovider：0SM_UPL_Mで取得した実行日数の値を紐づけて表示したところ

Object一覧の最終使用日には日付がはいっているのに、LISTCUBEから取得した情報には実行日数の値が入っていないプログラムが多く存在することがわかりました。

infoprovider：0SM_UPLMDでも確認してみましたが実行履歴の確認は出来ませんでした。

 

FioriのObject一覧で見られる最終使用日の履歴と、LISTCUBEで見られる履歴の乖離は設定の問題でしょうか？

原因と一致させて見られる対応方法があればお教えいただけると助かります。


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: CCLM オブジェクト一覧「Last Used」日付有LISTCUBEに履歴無
entry.content:
いただいた画面コピーによりますと、CCLM Object一覧にオブジェクトZA01CM005は正常記録されているようです。
LISTCUBEでは異なるオブジェクトZA01CMI0005を検索しようとしていて、確認いたしますが、二つオブジェクト
に何か関連性ありますか。LISTCUBEで検索しようとしたオブジェクトZA01CMI0005はCCLM Object一覧にありますか。

entry.title: Quotation with Proforma
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Greetings!

Customer need to create a Proforma with Quotation Ref. and Billing Approval workflow needed. Kindly help us.

Thanks


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Quotation with Proforma
entry.content:
Dear customer,

Please take a look at the following documentations for you to setup the wanted business scenario:

  • Process Navigator - SAP for Me -> You can reference which scope item meets the scenario where the proforma can be created based on the quotation. 
  • Preliminary Billing Document | SAP Help Portal -> In Cloud, could you please consider using the preliminary billing document instead of proforma invoices - this is intended for negotiation purpose.
  • Approval Workflows for Preliminary Billing Documents | SAP Help Portal -> Here you can see how the approval workflow is linked to this sort of invoice.

entry.title: Work Center set up - 3 Machines for combination of Finished goods
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I have below scenario and need to come up with the ideal work center set up option.

We have 3 Testing machines. Each can perform testing in a subset of finished goods (case given in below example). What would be the best way to set up the work center/s for proper capacity allocation and visibility? thank you.

Example

Test Machines - TM1, TM2 and TM3

Finished Goods - FG1, FG2, FG3, FG4, FG5, FG6, FG7, FG8, FG9 and FG10

TM1 can perform testing on FG1, FG3, FG5, FG7 and FG9. TM2 can perform testing on FG2, FG4, FG6 and  FG8. TM3 can perform testing on FG2, FG3, FG5, FG6, FG9 and FG10.

entry.title: Re: SAP CRYSTAL REPORT 2020 support ODBC DRIVER 18 FOR SQ...
entry.content:
I am currently Investigating this task, as Srividya is held up in other priorites,

In response to your earlier post, we installed the Crystal Report for Visual Studio SDK (SP35) CRforVS13SP35_0-80007712.EXE 32-bit version and have rebuilt our crystal report component by setting the Target Framework to .Net Framework 4.8 and referenced the CrystalDecisions references as appropriate. However, it resulted in the same error Table not found.

Please note, we have a 32 bit Main Application, in which the crystal report component is invoked, where we use Stored Procedure to populate the data from the database, which, when the latest “ODBC Driver 18 for SQL Server” used it connects successfully to our Main 32 bit Application but failed to launch the crystal reports, as it unable to identify the stored procedure and results in Table not found error.

And to note, we find that, in the same environment, if we use the legacy ODBC Driver that is available as default in windows machine “SQL Server” it works fine without any error.

On further investigation, we installed the latest crystal report version 2020 and tried “Set Location” and “Verify Database” using the ODBC datasource “ODBC Driver 18 for SQL Server” unable to perform both above activities, even with a new SP created and linked.

Hence, It would be helpful, if you could get some technical assistance on launching the Crystal report that uses the stored procedure via the “ODBC Driver 18 for SQL Server”, would help our investigation.

- Suresh Balasubramanian

entry.title: Re: Enabling Changeable IDs in MDG-F | SAP Master Data Governance | Central Governance

entry.title: Re: Deploy Fiori App into SAP S/4HANA Cloud launchpad
entry.content:
Hi Leemiri,

Are you deploy successfully? I can't connect my S4/Hana Public Cloud to BAS Trial, can you share tutorial or your step to connect it?

entry.title: Upgrade Windows and MSSQL in Production System
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We need to upgrade Windows(2019) and MSSQL(2016) to Windows(2022) and MSSQL (2019) in Production system. Please provide step by step solution to prevent data loss.

Thanks & Regards, 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Upgrade Windows and MSSQL in Production System
entry.content:
Below is a step-by-step methodology guide to upgrade Windows and MSSQL for your SAP system while ensuring that data is not lost. Note that this process may vary based on your specific system configuration and setup. Always ensure you have a rollback plan and a full backup before proceeding:

  1. Perform Full Backup

  2. Upgrade to Windows Server 2022:

    • Insert the Windows Server 2022 disk into your computer, or mount the ISO, and then double-click setup.exe.
    • On the Windows Server 2022 page, select 'Install now'.
    • On the Applicable notices and license terms page, select 'Accept the terms', and then select 'Next'.
    • On the 'Which type of installation do you want?' page, select 'Upgrade: Install Windows and keep files, settings, and applications'.

Note: Ensure to choose the right edition while upgrading.

  1. Post OS Upgrade:

    • After Successful upgrade to Windows Server 2022, verify everything is functioning properly.
    • confirm SAP application and database services are running without any issue.
    • Reboot and run a system integrity check.

  2. Upgrade SQL Server 2016 to 2019:

    • Run the SQL Server 2019 setup.
    • On the SQL Server Installation Center, select 'Installation'.
    • Then select 'Upgrade from a previous version of SQL Server'.
    • Follow the prompts to upgrade, making sure to specify the correct instance to upgrade.

  3. Post SQL Upgrade

    • After upgrading, confirm the SQL Server version.
    • Check for any errors in SQL Server error logs.
    • Test database connectivity and run SAP transactions to ensure accurate operation.

  4. Post Both Upgrades:

    • Start the SAP system and check that all the services are up and running.
    • ensure all functionality is working correctly.

entry.title: Re: Run and Deploy SAP CAP (Node.js or Java) with PostgreSQL on SAP BTP Cloud Foundry
entry.content:
Hi @kondiiq  @DSree 

I also faced the same error of message "TimeoutError: ResourceRequest timed out" recently by following CAP doc default configurations under evironment of MacOS also using latest cds-dk version as below.

@cap-js/cds-types: 0.2.0
@cap-js/postgres: 1.5.1
@cap-js/sqlite: 1.5.1
@sap/cds: 7.7.0
@sap/cds-compiler: 4.7.6
@sap/cds-dk: 7.7.0
@sap/cds-dk (global): 7.7.1
@sap/cds-fiori: 1.2.3
@sap/cds-foss: 5.0.0
@sap/cds-hana: 2.0.0
@sap/cds-mtxs: 1.16.0
@sap/eslint-plugin-cds: 2.6.5
Node.js: v18.19.1

Managed to solve it by debugging into deeper noticed that it's connecting with ipv6 refused issue with error messge "Error: connect ECONNREFUSED ::1:5432" 

Found a solution by testing which is to change db host configuration value from localhost to 127.0.0.1, then will work correctly because it's treated as ipv4. See my complete .cdsrc-private.json file content as below:

{
  "requires": {
    "db": {
      "kind": "postgres",
      "pool": {
        "acquireTimeoutMillis": 5000,
        "min": 1,
        "max": 100,
        "fifo": true
      },
      "credentials": {
        "host": "127.0.0.1", // <- Not default value localhost
        "port": 5432,
        "user": "postgres",
        "password": "postgres",
        "database": "postgres"
      }
    }
  }
}

BR, Sky

entry.title: Re: Need help implement logic in CPI Mapping
entry.content:
Hi Ryan,

It is not based on source field and I am using graphical mapping.

Basically posting IDOC in S/4 and I need to pass 0001 while posting the 1st IDOC and so on.

entry.title: Re: Upgrade Windows and MSSQL in Production System
entry.content:
Hi SAP Support,

Thanks for your valuable information,

You have to add one more step either before or after a full backup, Check the current SAP system to support the latest Windows OS and MS SQL DB.

Regards

SS

entry.title: How to refresh ALV Data in SALV on Click Event.
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a requirement when i click the Refresh button The data in ALV report should be refreshed. 

Which is not working can someone Help me with it.

Below is My Code:

CLASS lcl_handel_events IMPLEMENTATION.
METHOD user_command.
DATA: gt_final TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF zfit
SELECT *
FROM zfit
INTO TABLE gt_final.

gt_rows = lr_selections->get_selected_rows( ).

CASE e_salv_function.
* WHEN 'GT'.
* BREAK-POINT.
* ENDLOOP.
lo_gr_alv->refresh( refresh_mode = if_salv_c_refresh=>full ).
ENDIF.
WHEN 'BACK'.
LEAVE TO SCREEN 0.
WHEN 'REFRESH'.
lo_gr_alv->get_selections( ).
lo_gr_alv->refresh( ).
ENDCASE.
ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.

entry.title: Re: SAP IBM i: Migrate iASP to ASP
entry.content: Hi Former_member, I thing it is not possible, you have to perform the IBMi System copy ( Backup & Restore method) to build the new IBMi system with ASP environment.

entry.title: Re: TLB and PAL UoM
entry.content:
Hi, I just now solved this in my setup.Kindly refer below.

1. Check you have entered tlb profile in tcode /n/sapapo/tl3 for desired locations.

2.Go to /n/sapapo/tlbprf and there you can see your tlb profile, change it to Volume instead pallets.That's it, run TLB error will be resolved.

I hope it helps.

entry.title: Cloud- Plan cost in WBSEs in ‘Display Financial Plan Data’ app, but not in ‘Project Cost Report' app
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

In a S/4HANA Public Cloud system, I was able to import project cost plan data with the help of Mr. Ken Melching's (@Ken_Melching ) reply on this question: https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/project-cost-item-detail-planning-in-public-cloud-like-with-cj40-in-on/qaq-p/12810009

However, the values show up only in the ‘Display Financial Plan Data’ app and not in the ‘Project Cost Report' app (please see attached images). What am I missing? I'm not sure if the program R_FINS_PLAN_TRANS_CO_S4H_2_ERP can be used here to transfer the values from ACDOCP Table to CO Table Program. If yes, then what is the method to run this program in this system? Thank you.

Pratap Bhat

entry.title: Re: DBA Cockpit Webdynpro not displaying graphical explain
entry.content:
Hi Andreas

Have you tried clearing the browser history or any other browser?

Regards

SS

entry.title: Re: How to remove __Metadata from CPI json payload
entry.content:
Hi Akash,

Use below code to remove "__metadata" syntax: 

 

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message;
import groovy.json.JsonSlurper;
import groovy.json.JsonBuilder;

def Message processData(Message message)
{
    def body = message.getBody(java.lang.String) as String;
    def jsonParser = new JsonSlurper();
    def data = jsonParser.parseText(body);  
    data.d.results.each{ results ->
    results.remove('__metadata')
    }
    def JsonOutput = new JsonBuilder(data).toPrettyString()
    message.setBody(JsonOutput );
    return message;
}
 
Regards,
Carol Pereira

entry.title: MB52 Issue
entry.content:
In MB52 everything is showing fine however for a particular storage location the value unrestricted field is showing as zero however for other locations it is showing values. I have checked the MR21 and also change the layout but still it is showing as zero.

Please advise.

entry.title: Re: Work Center set up - 3 Machines for combination of Fi...
entry.content:
Hi,

  • Create individual work centers for each testing machine (TM1, TM2, TM3).
  • Create 3 routing groups add operations for each machine that can test to its respective work center  and assign relevant finished goods to it like:
    • Group 1 Operation on Work Center 1 (TM1): FG1, FG3, FG5, FG7, FG9
    • Group 2 Operation on Work Center 2 (TM2): FG2, FG4, FG6, FG8
    • Group 3 Opeartion on Work Center 3 (TM3): FG2, FG3, FG5, FG6, FG9, FG10
  • Finally, create Production versions

Regards

entry.title: Shift timing error - Shift finish 02:00:00 is after start of next shift 02:00:00
entry.content:
Hello,

I have defined shift timings as follows , A2 06:00 to 16:00, B2 16:00 to 02:00 and C3 02:00 to 06:00.

Assigned them in shift sequence. When i try to assign it to capacity of the work centre it gives error "Shift finish 02:00:00 is after start of next shift 02:00:00".

My shift sequence is as - A2, B2 & C2.

Shift define :-

Shift sequence :-

Request you to share your thoughts on this problem .

Thanks & Regards,

Shubham

@rupesh_brahmankar3 @

entry.title: Re: SAP certification
entry.content:
Hi,

Consider SAP S/4HANA Supply Chain or Procurement certifications to deepen your expertise. Alternatively, explore Ariba, SAP S/4HANA Transportation Management for logistics focus. For a broader skill set, SAP Fiori Application Developer or SAP Activate Project Manager certifications are valuable. Stay updated on industry trends to ensure your choice aligns with current demands.

Regards

entry.title: Re: During VL02N PGI, get error "Change the inspection st...
entry.content:
Hi,

Movement type 331 is for withdrawal of quality stock for sampling, check material master quality view (Inspection types) and destructive sample indicator.

Regards

entry.title: Re: Looking for a global setting to make WebI reports rem...
entry.content: Unfortunately I am not the one that designed most universes, and reviewing each universe is a larger job for now than simply changing a setting. Thus, if there is a setting it would be useful for the moment.

entry.title: Re: SAP Integration Suite - External logging to Splunk
entry.content:
Hey,
I am using a Trial account and in the Role Collections I am not able to see the roles  "ExternalLoggingActivate" and "ExternalLoggingActivationRead" as options.

 

Here is a screenshot

What should I do?

entry.title: Re: S4-FSCM-Activate Credit Management Basic Steps
entry.content: Thank you Satish, for the detailed blog. Well researched and implemented. It will be helpful for the community.

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP开发案例之六：BOM批量读取
entry.content:
紧随这篇博客，今天我们将再次逐步详细地介绍一个利用SAP S/4HANA Cloud三系统来做开发扩展的案例。

 

1. 案例背景

我们有些客户希望查看BOM所有层级的数据，也希望能够批量下载BOM所有层级的数据。我们有标准应用程序“Display BOM level by level”可以查看或下载单个物料的BOM所有层级信息，但是没有应用程序可以查看或下载多个物料的BOM所有层级数据。我们这个案例的开发应用就是来完成这样一个需求。

standard App Display BOM level by level can only view the data for single Material

 

 

通过开发人员可扩展性，我们创建了一个自定义的应用程序，允许用户选择多个物料，可以查看或下载所选物料的所有节点数据。

 

 

2. 后台服务开发

2.1 创建数据定义

创建一个新的数据定义（data definition）

 

 

2.2 创建查询实现类

创建类ZCL_BOM_DISPLAY，在这个类里包含了详细的数据查询逻辑。

 

 

METHOD get_bom_hierarchy.

*get BOM Link and BOM hierarchy based on condition
    SELECT *
    FROM I_BOMComponentWithKeyDate( p_keydate = @RP_keydate ) AS Bom
    JOIN I_MaterialBOMLink AS Bomlink
      ON Bom~BillOfMaterialCategory = Bomlink~BillOfMaterialCategory
     AND Bom~BillOfMaterialVariant = Bomlink~BillOfMaterialVariant
     AND Bom~BillOfMaterial = Bomlink~BillOfMaterial
    WHERE Bomlink~BillOfMaterialCategory = 'M'
    AND Bomlink~BillOfMaterialVariant = '01'
    AND Bomlink~Material IN @RT_material
    AND Bomlink~Plant IN @RT_plant
    INTO TABLE @DATA(lt_BOMlist).

    IF sy-subrc = 0.
      rv_resp = abap_true.
      CLEAR pt_materialhierarchy.
    ENDIF.
    LOOP AT lt_BOMlist ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<lfs_bomlist>).
      MOVE-CORRESPONDING <lfs_bomlist>-bomlink TO ps_response.
      MOVE-CORRESPONDING <lfs_bomlist>-bom TO ps_response.

      "Get product descrption saperatelly since CDS view does not have it.
      SELECT SINGLE ProductName FROM I_producttext
      WHERE Product = @PS_response-material AND Language = @SY-langu INTO @PS_response-materialDesc.

      APPEND ps_response TO pt_response.
      CLEAR ps_response.

      ps_material-sign = 'I'.
      ps_material-option = 'EQ'.
      ps_material-low = <lfs_bomlist>-bom-BillOfMaterialComponent.
      APPEND ps_material TO pt_materialhierarchy.
      CLEAR ps_material.
    ENDLOOP.

  ENDMETHOD.

 

 

2.3 创建服务定义和服务绑定

创建服务定义（Service Definition）

 

创建服务绑定（Service Binding）

 

然后，我们可以预览服务如下：

 

3. 前端应用开发

首先，配置BTP上的destination。

然后，打开SAP Business Application Studio服务

 

从Application Generator里选取List Report Page模板

 

把App部署到SAP S/4hana Public Cloud系统

 

复制Launchpad App Description Item名字到IAM App：

 

通过该新应用，我们不仅可以选择多个物料来查看BOM的节点信息，也可以把所有数据下载到Excel表格，以方便用户线下操作。

 

 

以上是该案例——BOM批量读取自开发应用的步骤介绍。希望通过此案例的介绍能让您了解到三系统开发能实现的常见功能。

entry.title: How to show value help with values for Application Job parameters - BTP ABAP Environment
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I have created Application Job Catalog Entries & Application Job Templates with two Selection parameters. I want to have this parameters a value help values so users can select from popup. In the Job Catalog entry, I have defined Value help exit class with Implemented interface IF_APJ_RT_VALUE_HELP_EXIT. How can I populate the value help values for these two parameters ?

I didn't find any blog/documentation related to this.

https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/sap-business-technology-platform/application-jobs-2?locale=zh-CNstate%3DPRODUCTION

Thanks a lot.

Best Regards,

Muthu

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 财务-总账会计常见热点问题汇总FAQ
entry.content:
欢迎来到我们的博客！在这篇文章中，我们将SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition上收集到的产品常见问题做一个汇总并且定期更新这篇文章，以反映SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition上常见问题最新的发展和变化。我们希望通过这样的方式，为您提供一个全面、及时的资源，帮助您更好地了解和利用SAP产品的功能。

本文涉及功能基于SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition 2308版本，后续版本如果有变化请参考本文最新信息。

1总帐会计 – 基本配置

总帐会计。

1.1功能货币  

Q: 如何能够自动的以美元显示报表 ？

A:     请参考链接理解S/4HANA Cloud里的货币，以及功能货币的细节。从1911版本开始支持功能货币的功能呢，财务的核心应用基本都支持功能货币，后续的版本也一直在增加应用对功能货币的支持。 启用功能货币的注意事项，参考“避坑指南”中的相关章节。

1.2银行科目被强制拆分 

Q: 在2008之后凭证分割已经增强了对科目拆分的逻辑，所以在过账时会根据对方科目上的利润中心来拆分出多条行项目。而且只支持对银行科目和公司代码清账科目这两类资产负债表科目，不支持对缺省利润中心目的支持。 

A:     如果不想拆分银行科目或者公司代码清账科目，请参照SSCUI 102529来对科目分配缺省利润中心。 

1.3凭证分割的设置 

Q: 是否可以取消凭证分割的功能？

A:     SAP不建议客户在生产系统中开启或关闭凭证分割功能，因为会导致更改前后的文档会有不一致。Cloud系统的配置是标准化的，凭证分割功能默认是激活的。  

1.4重分类应收、应付科目的SSCUI在什么地方 

Q: 如题

A:     SSCUI 100297,进入如下路径：财务会计-> 总账会计-> 传输并排序应收账款和应付账款 

1.5如何找到仓库收发货货物移动的会计科目配置点 

Q: 如题

A:  有两个方法， 第一个方法，找到收发货货物移动产生的财务凭证，更改布局，找到字段‘Trs‘，即‘交易码’ 。然后在SSCUI 100297里找到配置点：范围‘货源确定和采购’交易组‘RMK’交易吗‘UMB’科目表‘YCOA’ 。在科目配置进行科目分配。第二个方法，找到过账的物料的会计科目， 通过app管理总账科目主数据的使用位置。

1.6税码 

Q: 在Cloud上如何维护税码？

A:       如下

 

关于如何在S/4HANA Cloud创建税码，请参阅注释3009061 - How to create tax code in S/4Hana Cloud 

https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/3009061 

 

关于如何在S/4HANA Cloud删除税码，请参阅注释3092673 - Delete tax code in S4HC 

https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/3092673 

 

关于如何在S/4HANA Cloud创建基于时间的税码（TDT），请参阅注释2936931 - TDT S/4Hana Cloud 

https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/2936931 

 

 

1.7一次性把所有的科目从现有公司扩充新公司代码的方法 

Q: 如题

A:       使用app 管理总账科目主数据，选择公司代码视图下，使用功能‘复制到公司代码’, 但是最多一次选择500个科目。如果提示权限不够 ，得有标准角色: SAP_BR_BPC_EXPER的权限 

 

1.8会计科目表是否允许新增？ 

Q: 如题

A:       基于云产品的理念，快速实施以及标准化流程，S/4HANA Cloud上有预交付的标准运营会计科目表，命名为YCOA供全球用户使用，而且是不能删除的.它会默认分配给所有公司代码,而且不允许更改这个分配。 

 截止到2108版本，已经提供配置步骤/应用让客户可以把标准的运营/组/备选科目表转换成客户的运营/组/备选科目表，包括：科目长度可以自己定义（通过配置更改），批量重新定义科目描述，批量重新定义科目编码，客户备选科目表 

编码可以是字母数字混合编码，可以选择控制不使用的部分科目不传输到P系统，批量上传和下载科目到MS excel进行批量调整， 

 关于运营科目表/组科目表/备选科目表的详细信息，可以参考如下链接来进一步理解 

https://help.sap.com/viewer/0fa84c9d9c634132b7c4abb9ffdd8f06/LATEST/zh-CN/9f53c2531bb9b44ce10000000a174cb4.html 

 

1.9快速批量创建科目到生产系统？ 

Q: 某些在Q系统创建的测试科目不需要传输或者同步到生产系统，该如何操作？

A:       使用app总账科目同步, 在Q和P系统执行一下，就OK了 

 

1.10可以不传输或者同步某些科目到生产系统吗？ 

Q: 如题

A:       可以在app管理总账科目主数据里，勾选不使用的总账科目 

 

1.11设置总帐科目的未清项管理 

Q: 如题

A:       可以使用app 计划会计核算数据更正来进行处理。成功之后，该科目的历史业务凭证也会变成未清项凭证，可以进行手工或者自动清账处理。 

参考帮助文档链接 

参考Fiori链接 

 

 

2总账会计- 业务操作

如题。

2.1会计年度变式和自动开关账期

Q: 如题。如何设置和取舍？

A:       默认交付的会计年度变式是K4，其中包含4个特殊期间,便于记录调整业务的数据，可以放到13-16期间；app管理过账期间。但是如果使用含有特殊期间的会计年度变式，就无法使用app管理过账期间里的后台作业实现自动开关账期的功能了。 

详情，请参见注释2896867 - Manage Posting Periods app (F2293): Failed to schedule recurrence because the item contains special periods 

 

 

2.2科目余额可否以交易货币显示？

Q: 如题。因为客户有外币业务，现在显示科目余额的APP都是人民币，但是财务人员要已交易货币（例如港币，美元）显示科目余额的APP，方便查看。是否有这样的APP？ 

A:       可以用app 试算平衡表。在导航面板里的列 – 度量 里 选择 交易货币的四个度量 ，就可以实现了。 

 

2.3开具供应商发票时，选择的采购订单行项目不能超过999行项目

Q: 我们一个月同一个供应商涉及的采购订单行项目涉及几千行，开供应商发票，过账无法超过999行财务凭证行项目，如要拆成好多张，非常麻烦

A:       参考这个注释来操作吧 https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/2845836 另外参照博文https://blogs.sap.com/?p=1364264来进一步了解操作 

2.4 App管理过账期间的操作日志

Q: 在一个用户操作了过账期间之后，想查看操作的日期、时间和用户信息 

A:       截止到最新版本，没有这个功能。参考注释3028569 - There are no change logs for "Manage Posting Periods" 

同时，也请投票到https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/242132以便把您的需求传递到开发部门。 

2.5 app过账含清账被弃用之后应收、应付、预付款及往来账户调整和清账的业务如何处理？ 

Q: 从2111版本开始过账含清账会被删除，用户无法使用它来处理业务。 

A:       请参照如下博文进行操作 

1 

从S/4 HANA Cloud ES 2102总账科目手工清账使用的应用变化谈起来 

https://blogs.sap.com/?p=1272181 

2 

S/4 HANA Cloud 2102开始弃用app过账（含清账）之后对应收和应付的调整如何操作？ 

https://blogs.sap.com/?p=1282259 

3 

S/4 HANA Cloud 2102 开始弃用app过账（含清账）之后对预付款业务如何操作？ 

https://blogs.sap.com/?p=1299107 

4 

浅谈S/4HANA Cloud里如何处理特殊总账标识业务-大结局 

https://blogs.sap.com/?p=1307755 

5 

浅谈如何在S/4HANA Cloud里对未清项使用和实现收付款的剩余金额功能 

https://blogs.sap.com/?p=1289105 

 

2.6 客户第一次经历独自年结，希望可以分享各模块余额结转和账期结转的最佳实践案例 FICO、MM、SD、PP各模块是否都有年结相关流程。 

Q: 如题。 

A: 请参见链接 

 

2.7 同时对多个公司开启关闭过账期间 

Q: 如题。 

A:       需求的客户，可以投票到https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/255206/?section=sectionDetails 

 

2.8 集成汇率到SAP S/4HANA Cloud 

Q:      如题。 

A:       需求的客户，可以投票到https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/255206/?section=sectionDetails 

 

客户的需求汇总在CIP Public API to integrate Exchange Rate in S4H Public Cloud 

需要如下两个SI能实现，不会提供单独的API 

1S4 (Market Rates Management - Automatically via SAP Cloud Platform),  

https://rapid.sap.com/bp/#/browse/scopeitems/1S4 

1XN (Market Rates Management - Manually via Upload) 

https://rapid.sap.com/bp/#/browse/scopeitems/1XN 

 

3总帐-报表

3.1如何按照利润中心、业务范围、段出示报表？ 

Q:      如题。 

A:       预交付的系统的默认配置没有勾选，利润中心必输，这意味着凭证里所有的行项目不一定都会有利润中心的值，因此利润中心的报表会缺失数据，导致信息不完整。 

请参考2868475 - SSCUI: Define Document Splitting Characteristics for General Ledger。 

只有提交事件，要求SAP提供专家配置可以用来更改此设置，可以通过CSM请求。 

需要注意的是， 在项目实施阶段，激活此配置，并进行业务测试，可以最大化的实现需求； 

如果上线后才激活此配置，需要进行大量的业务测试，非常耗费人力。 

请一定慎重考虑。 

 

3.2现金流量表

Q:      如题。 

A:       现金流量表有新旧两个方案，都提供直接法和间接法两种方法，都有配置点； 

旧的现金流量表方案已经在2019.12.31终止后续功能增强，老方案在J58中; 

新的方案基于高级合规报表 

新方案在1J2里，并且同时需要J78，须额外授权费。 

参见如下链接了解， 

https://help.sap.com/viewer/147436affce24e81892eee2076a78116/2105.500/zh-CN/361bb7e78a1e4077840fa406417eb0dc.html 

 

4总帐-权限

4.1是否可以在这个app管理过账期间上实现功能上的控制

Q:      是否可以在这个app（管理过账期间）上实现功能上的控制，比如A用户只能进行操作1，不能进行操作2。 CO期间这个操作会关系到所有的分公司，希望只有财务经理可以进行操作。 

A:       请通过限制类型 - 公司代码/分类账/业务交易类型 来实现, 通过授权或者不授权业务交易类型来给予该用户是否可以对CO期间的访问和操作。同时可以参照博文进一步了解现在Cloud上能实现的权限控制的实例。 

4.2版本升级之后发现SSCUI无权限进入，如何处理？

Q:      如题 

A:       参照注释来操作 3071670 - Unable to access or configure SSCUI in Configure your Solution https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/3071670 

 

更多链接

后勤FAQ
https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/sap-s-4hana-cloud-public-edition-%E5%90%8E%E5%8B%A4%E5%B8%B8%E8%A7%81%E7%83%AD%E7%82%B9%E9%97%AE%E9%A2%98%E6%B1%87%E6%80%BBfaq/ba-p/13598781

销售FAQ

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/sap-erp-%E4%BA%91%E9%94%80%E5%94%AE%E6%A8%A1%E5%9D%97%E5%B8%B8%E8%A7%81%E9%97%AE%E9%A2%98%E6%B1%87%E6%80%BB-s-4hana-cloud-public-edition-sales-faq-collection/ba-p/13627753

集成与扩展FAQ

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/sap-s-4hana-cloud-public-edition-%E9%9B%86%E6%88%90%E6%89%A9%E5%B1%95%E5%B8%B8%E8%A7%81%E7%83%AD%E7%82%B9%E9%97%AE%E9%A2%98%E6%B1%87%E6%80%BB%E4%B9%8B%E4%B8%80-faq1/ba-p/13621594

entry.title: IFlow getting into error status even with End message event in exception sub process in SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hi,

In one of our sync interface, we have an exception sub process with error start event and end message event. We added it deliberately because we want to send custom response message to sender instead of Internal server error 500.

This was working fine , but recently (don't know whether its an update or change by SAP) with end message also we are getting Internal server error 500 and getting to failed status in monitoring.

Is there any other way of returning custom response to sender ?

entry.title: Re: SAP PPPI Material quantity calculation?
entry.content: Hi Caetano, i checked in STPO and STKO tables. I couldn't find MQC field?

entry.title: Re: Build Apps - 500 Error
entry.content: hi all, thanks for all your replies. It's OK now after I asked another colleague who never logon before to login.

entry.title: Re: Transaction code :- BO_X4_CUNI
entry.content: Hello Marius , Thankyou for the solution .

entry.title: Re: Announcement: New release of content and central entry point for SAP BTP Solution Diagrams
entry.content:
@MioYasuatke You can make use of the AIO config here:

https://sap.github.io/btp-solution-diagrams/docs/solution_diagr_intro/intro/#add-sap-colors-btp-icons-logos-etc-to-drawio-configuration-at-once

You can then add globally the libraries w/o adding anytime the lib's again (only in case of changes/new icons)

Did this help?

 

thx and best,

Fabian

entry.title: Re: How to handle if-match header via BTP destination?
entry.content:
If I understood correctly, when you retrieve the record you want to update, you store the ETAG in a page variable. You will have to create a REST data resource with destination, and set up the PATTCH call "manually" and there you can send a header that is bound to that page variable.

I don't know if there is some automated way to do this, or whether SAP Build Apps handles the ETAG for you.

I think when SAP Build Apps uses actions for data access some of this will be simpler.

entry.title: How to bind xsuaa details in deployment yaml to authenticate api in SAP BTP kyma runtime
entry.content:
"Hello community,

I am currently working with SAP BTP Kyma Runtime and aiming to bind XSUAA details in the deployment YAML file to enable API authentication from the Kyma runtime. Any blogs or references on this topic would be highly appreciated.

entry.title: About Workarea Folder Structure in SAP Enable Now for Simulations & In-App Content
entry.content:
Please help with your inputs on the Workarea folder structure as requested below:

Scenario 01:

In the SAP Enable Now, we created a new regular Workarea. The Workarea shows the Content folder automatically created under Unsorted, as shown in the picture below.

Now, under the Contents folder, to store simulations, I will create the subfolders, such as Creation, Maintenance, and Publish as explained in the Master Author course and in this Community blog. 

My Question: Should the Content folder remain under Unsorted, or should I manually move it to some other location in the Workarea, for example, Root Group? What is the best practice for the same?

Scenario 02:

In the second scenario, we created an Extended Workarea based on a standard Workarea. The extended workarea does not show the Content folder created automatically under Unsorted, as shown in the picture below:

Question 01: 

Here, I want to create subfolders to store simulations as well In-App guided tutorials. So, should I manually create the Content folder first under Unsorted, and then create the subfolders, such as "Creation, Maintenance, and Publish"?

Finally, should my subfolders be under Unsorted only, or need to be moved to some other location in the Extended workarea? What's the best practice here?

Question 02: 

For the In-App content as well, should I use the similar folder structure such as "Creation, Maintenance, and Publish" like simulations? OR, we generally do not duplicate the In-App Guided Tour shells under Creation, Maintenance, and Publish folders separately. What is the best practice here?

Thanking you in advance for your inputs.

entry.title: Re: Clock In Clock Out in SAP SuccessFactors Time Tracking – Overview and How-To Guide
entry.content:
Hi Uumakant,

The time type Id is an optional field in the request body for the terminal API. Please refer to the documentation - REST API for Sending Time Events from Terminal to Clock In Clock Out | SAP Help Portal

The P10 time type event Id can be used for all the time types and when there is a pair created, they will be assigned with the associated time type sent from the terminal.

Regards

Neetha

Sai Bhargav

entry.title: Re: Hello dears i need this scope item to be localized at...
entry.content:
Hi,

Event-Based Production Cost Posting (scope item 3F0) available for all countries.

Event-Based Production Accounting (3F0) 

Event-Based (3F0) versus Period-Based (BEI) 

Regards

entry.title: Re: Hello dears i need this scope item to be localized at...
entry.content: i don't think so , because I tried many times without any result , and please note we talk about public cloud

entry.title: Re: IAS is mandatory for customers with Microsoft Azure S...
entry.content: We describe our best practices for the scenarios on the Microsoft docs here: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/active-directory/fundamentals/scenario-azure-first-sap-identity-integration

entry.title: Re: Hello dears i need this scope item to be localized at...
entry.content: 3F0 has already been the default scope item for production cost posting in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition since year 2021 for the newly implemented customers. Only with rare valid business reasons would SAP approve the request to activate the optional scope item BEI for newly implemented customers. Now SAP is announcing the deprecation of BEI, which means the customers went live before year 2021 and the customers went live after year 2021 but also requested to use BEI are supposed to transition from BEI to 3F0 before BEI is completely retired.

entry.title: Re: IAS is mandatory for customers with Microsoft Azure S...
entry.content: We describe our best practices for the scenarios of integrating SAP IAS and Entra ID (formerly Azure AD) on the Microsoft docs here: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/active-directory/fundamentals/scenario-azure-first-sap-identity-integration

entry.title: Key differences between MDG on SAP S/4 HANA and SAP S/4 HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Can anyone tell the differences between MDG on SAP S/4 HANA and SAP S/4 HANA Cloud. How feasible it is to move current MDG system on S/4 Hana on-premise to S/4 Hana Cloud. Do S/4 Hana cloud supports all objects in MDG like Financials, Business partners, Material etc...

Any SAP blogs/ Support portal links would help.

entry.title: Lead -Times for Material Master and Info record
entry.content:
Hello Team,

 

Lead-Times in MaterialMaster are based on 5 working days. Lead-Times in Info-Records are based on 7 calendar days. Is  there is a possibility in customizing to unify same as both .
